title: Diagnostic criteria for impulse control disorders
paperName: Paper 3 - Specialist Options: Approaches, Issues and Debates
summary: 9990 Clinical — kleptomania, pyromania, and impulse control disorder criteria.
learningObjectives: Define impulse control disorders and key examples.
Apply diagnostic criteria from classification systems.

simpleExplanation.title: Acting without thinking
simpleExplanation.summary: Impulse control disorders involve failure to resist urges that harm self or others — diagnosed when impulses are recurrent and distressing.
steps: Differentiate from OCD and conduct disorder.

sections.content: **Impulse control diagnosis** (1.3.1) — know **DSM criteria** and **distinction from OCD**.

sections.label: Mark an impulse control diagnosis question
